integration_validation_v2.gap: Acceptance 'merge Pose/ComfyUI rows, normalize ids, mark missing as blockers' has no executable merge: DiagnosticsPoseRowMerge is a string literal in a Planned manual row. No normalization/blocker code; proof is in-memory membership only.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_manual/content.rs:2678-2697 (diagnostics_pose_row_merge status Planned, 'Data-only'); DiagnosticsPoseRowMerge only in content.rs as literal; tests/model_manual_tests.rs:738-747 (in-memory feature-group assertion, no PG/EventLedger, no merge run)

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Same executable merge engine with ManualMergeSourceKind::PoseComfy over MT-122..125 groups (model_manual_merge.rs:155-160,236-301). Proof: tests/atelier_model_manual_merge_tests.rs:289-370 (count vs independently derived distinct pose command set + specific rows, persisted to managed PG, pose_comfy ledger event) and :391-411 (3 absent groups become MISSING_FEATURE_GROUP blockers).
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
